nasb.text: He was most honored of the thirty, therefore he became their commander; however, he did not attain to the three.

esv.text: He was the most renowned of the thirty and became their commander, but he did not attain to the three.

cnv.text: 他的榮譽比那“三十勇士”高，所以成為他們的領袖；不過，卻不及“三勇士”。

ccb.text: 最有声望，因此做了他们的统领，只是不及前三位勇士。
